results.title: Lexical
results.description: Lexical is an extensible text editor framework that provides excellent reliability, accessibility and performance.

results.title: Lexical
results.description: Lexical is an extensible JavaScript web text-editor framework focused on reliability, accessibility, and performance, enabling developers to build unique text editing experiences.

results.title: PayloadCMS Lexical Ext
results.description: Extended lexical editor features for Payload CMS (Text color, highlight, block background, embeds)

results.title: shadcn/editor
results.description: A rich text editor built on the Lexical framework, utilizing shadcn/ui components for a modern and extensible editing experience.

results.title: Lexical Beautiful Mentions
results.description: A customizable mentions plugin for the Lexical editor, offering features like multiple triggers, programmatic control, automatic spacing, and custom styling for a richer user experience.

results.title: Payload Plugin Lexical
results.description: A Payload CMS plugin that adds a Lexical-based rich text editor, offering advanced features and a modern alternative to Slate.

results.title: Flex
results.description: Flex is a fast lexical analyzer generator that creates programs to recognize lexical patterns in text.

results.title: Payload Lexical Typography
results.description: A plugin that extends Payload's Lexical editor with advanced text formatting options including color, font size, letter spacing, line height, and font family customization.

results.title: Lexxy
results.description: Lexxy is a modern rich text editor for Rails, built on Lexical, offering Markdown support, syntax highlighting, and seamless integration with Action Text.

results.title: Svelte Lexical
results.description: Svelte Lexical provides Svelte bindings and high-level components for Lexical, an extensible rich-text editor framework developed by Facebook.

results.title: Helix
results.description: Helix is a modern, modal text editor providing efficient navigation, customizable keybindings, themes, and built-in language support.

results.title: Shadcn Editor
results.description: Lexical base rich text editor using shadcn/ui components

results.title: Helix Editor
results.description: Helix Editor is a modern, modal text editor inspired by Vim and Kakoune, featuring built-in language server support and tree-sitter integration for a selection-first editing experience.

results.title: Curvenote Editor
results.description: An interactive scientific editor built with ProseMirror, React, and Redux for creating reactive documents and explorable explanations.

results.title: Lexical Playground Next.js
results.description: A Lexical Editor Playground built with Next.js, showcasing features like collaborative editing with Yjs, custom themes, and various plugins in a modern React environment.

results.title: Redactor
results.description: Redactor is a powerful and customizable WYSIWYG editor for web content creation. It offers features like AI tools, plugin support, and seamless integration with various frameworks.

results.title: Overleaf
results.description: A web-based collaborative LaTeX editor

results.title: Lexoid
results.description: Lexoid is an efficient document parsing library supporting both LLM-based and static PDF document parsing, leveraging multi-modal LLM advancements for user convenience.

results.title: Editor.js
results.description: Editor.js is an open-source, block-style text editor that outputs clean JSON data, offering a flexible and extensible content creation experience with a modern UI and a well-designed API.

results.title: Thing Editor
results.description: Thing-editor is a visual game editor built with TypeScript, Pixi.js, and Vite.js, offering a robust environment for game development.

results.title: wangEditor
results.description: An open-source web rich-text editor that is ready to use out-of-the-box, easy to configure, and supports JS, Vue, and React.

results.title: DragonEditor
results.description: DragonEditor is a WYSIWYG editor module specifically designed for Nuxt3 applications, allowing users to create and display rich content.

results.title: String Editor
results.description: A Gleam library for string manipulation and extraction, allowing users to extract substrings before, after, or between specific patterns.

results.title: ass-editor
results.description: A high-performance, ergonomic editor layer for ASS subtitles with interactive editing, advanced search, and extensibility.

results.title: Laravel Mail Editor
results.description: Laravel Mail Editor is a web-based package for creating, managing, and editing Laravel mailables with a WYSIWYG editor, email templates, and testing capabilities without using the command line.

results.title: Tipex Editor
results.description: Tipex is a highly customizable rich text editor built for Svelte applications, leveraging TipTap and ProseMirror for a powerful and intuitive editing experience.

results.title: Creative Editor SDK for SvelteKit
results.description: The Creative Editor SDK for SvelteKit is a powerful and customizable library for crafting and editing rich visual designs directly in the browser, offering features like templating, asset management, and advanced editing capabilities such as background removal and print optimization.

results.title: CreativeEditor SDK (llmstxt)
results.description: CreativeEditor SDK (CE.SDK) is a fully client-side, customizable toolkit for integrating photo, video, and design editing capabilities into web, mobile, and desktop applications.

results.title: Prism Code Editor
results.description: Prism code editor is a lightweight, extensible code editor component for the web that uses Prism for syntax highlighting, offering a wide array of features and extensions.

results.title: Rhino Editor
results.description: Rhino Editor is a durable and flexible editor designed for an easy out-of-the-box experience, offering hooks and plugins for easy extension.
